Interface ClaimDao

public interface ClaimDao
JDBI DAO for the clan_claims table.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static final record 
    ClaimDao.ClaimInsert
    A single row for batch insertion, with values already in DB-native types (clanId as a string, claimedAt as an epoch second).
    static final record 
    ClaimDao.ClaimRow
    Raw row from the clan_claims table.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    deleteAllClaimsForClan(String clanId, String serverId)
    Deletes all claims owned by a clan on a given server.
    void
    deleteClaim(String serverId, String world, int chunkX, int chunkZ)
    Deletes the claim for a specific chunk on a given server.
    List<ClaimDao.ClaimRow>
    findAllClaims(String serverId)
    Returns all claim rows for a given server.
    Optional<ClaimDao.ClaimRow>
    findClaimByChunk(String serverId, String world, int chunkX, int chunkZ)
    Finds the claim for a specific chunk on a given server.
    List<ClaimDao.ClaimRow>
    findClaimsByClan(String clanId, String serverId)
    Returns all claims owned by the given clan on a given server.
    void
    insertClaim(String serverId, String world, int chunkX, int chunkZ, String clanId, long claimedAt)
    Inserts a new territory claim.
    void
    insertClaims(String serverId, List<ClaimDao.ClaimInsert> claims)
    Inserts many claims in a single batched statement.

  • Method Details

    • insertClaim

      void insertClaim(String serverId, String world, int chunkX, int chunkZ, String clanId, long claimedAt)
      Inserts a new territory claim.
      Parameters:
      serverId - the server this claim belongs to
      world - the world name
      chunkX - the chunk X coordinate
      chunkZ - the chunk Z coordinate
      clanId - the owning clan's UUID as a string
      claimedAt - epoch-second claim timestamp

    • insertClaims

      void insertClaims(String serverId, List<ClaimDao.ClaimInsert> claims)
      Inserts many claims in a single batched statement. Each ClaimDao.ClaimInsert row supplies its own column values (already converted to DB-native types); serverId is held constant across the batch.
      Parameters:
      serverId - the server these claims belong to
      claims - the rows to insert

    • deleteClaim

      void deleteClaim(String serverId, String world, int chunkX, int chunkZ)
      Deletes the claim for a specific chunk on a given server.
      Parameters:
      serverId - the server this claim belongs to
      world - the world name
      chunkX - the chunk X coordinate
      chunkZ - the chunk Z coordinate

    • deleteAllClaimsForClan

      void deleteAllClaimsForClan(String clanId, String serverId)
      Deletes all claims owned by a clan on a given server. Used when a clan is disbanded.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan's UUID as a string
      serverId - the server this clan belongs to

    • findClaimByChunk

      Optional<ClaimDao.ClaimRow> findClaimByChunk(String serverId, String world, int chunkX, int chunkZ)
      Finds the claim for a specific chunk on a given server.
      Parameters:
      serverId - the server to look up the claim on
      world - the world name
      chunkX - the chunk X coordinate
      chunkZ - the chunk Z coordinate
      Returns:
      the claim row, or empty if the chunk is unclaimed on this server

    • findClaimsByClan

      List<ClaimDao.ClaimRow> findClaimsByClan(String clanId, String serverId)
      Returns all claims owned by the given clan on a given server.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the owning clan's UUID as a string
      serverId - the server this clan belongs to
      Returns:
      all claim rows for this clan

    • findAllClaims

      List<ClaimDao.ClaimRow> findAllClaims(String serverId)
      Returns all claim rows for a given server. Used to seed the TerritoryCache on startup.
      Parameters:
      serverId - the server to load claims for
      Returns:
      all claim rows for this server
